commits: 4c1dc09 - bober(sprint-1): FleetDecomposer module — goal → validated FleetManifest

filesChanged.description: FleetDecomposer module: decomposeGoal, validateManifest, callDecomposer, DECOMPOSE_SYSTEM_PROMPT, DECOMPOSE_COERCION_INSTRUCTION, DECOMPOSE_MAX_RETRIES=1. JSON extraction mirrors parsePlanSpec (direct→fence→first-brace). Config-key guard runs after FleetManifestSchema.safeParse via Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call. Always passes jsonObjectMode:true, never sets responseSchema.

22 tests using ScriptedClient fake LLMClient. Covers valid-first-try (1 call), invalid-then-coerce-success (2 calls), invalid-twice-throws (Zod path), child-with-config rejected, fenced-json + first-brace extraction, jsonObjectMode:true on all calls, responseSchema absent, maxRetries=0 boundary.

notes: Call counts: valid-first-try=1, invalid-then-coerce=2, invalid-twice=2-then-throw, child-with-config=2 (guard routes to retry). Config-key guard runs inside validateManifest AFTER safeParse. Generator claims the single failing test (src/discovery/scanner.test.ts:341) is PRE-EXISTING (confirmed via git stash + retest on clean branch head) — EVALUATOR MUST independently verify this regression claim. Full suite: 1 failed | 2231 passed | 3 skipped.
